economic_notes: Ozhushk-Onegaming Corporation (GBE) had revenue of $12,877,806 and income of $745,389. 274164 Ontario Limited o/a The Reef Store by the Lake had revenue of $1,988,222 and a loss of $150,951. Golden Eagle Casino and Charitable Entertainment Centre consolidated. Gaming revenues subject to audit qualification due to lack of dual custody over cash.
notes: Audit is qualified on two bases: (1) gaming revenues completeness cannot be verified due to lack of dual custody over cash and gaming cards; (2) incomplete inventory of tangible capital assets — not all major asset classes have been capitalized per PS 3150. Auditor firm name not explicitly stated beyond 'Chartered Professional Accountants' located in Winnipeg, Manitoba, signed September 15, 2025 (report date appears to be over a year after fiscal year end). Three consolidated subsidiaries: Golden Eagle Casino and Charitable Entertainment Centre, Wauzhushk Onigum Foundation, and Kinew Day Care. Two GBEs on modified equity basis: Ozhushk-Onegaming Corporation and 274164 Ontario Limited o/a The Reef Store by the Lake. Budget was not prepared on a consolidated basis. Flood claim advances of $844,401 from Government of Canada are included in long-term debt.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
